svg.title: The Epic of one-bright-star
svg.desc: In the year 2018, the developer first set foot upon the public forge, and the epic began. And lo, docs rose from nothing, and a hundred stars gathered to witness it. And lo, flagship rose from nothing, and fourteen thousand stars gathered to witness it. And lo, helper rose from nothing, and three hundred stars gathered to witness it. And renown gathered upon the developer: a hundred stars in all. And renown gathered upon the developer: a thousand stars in all. And renown gathered upon the developer: ten thousand stars in all.
svg.text: TypeScript Specialist · Star Magnet · Followed · Heavy PR Contributor
